actions.queueDisabled: Queue is not available in this version

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.hardwareAccelerationDescription: Uses GPU for better processing performance (recommended).
preferences.cookiesBrowserDescription: Imports cookies from the selected browser to access to protected content more reliably (recommended).
preferences.createFolderPerDownloadDescription: Save each download inside a folder named after its output file.
preferences.restartRequired: Restart required for hardware acceleration changes.

status.not_available: Cosmo Downloader is up to date.

exportSettings.title: Export Settings
exportSettings.trimUnavailable: Trimming needs a known video duration.
exportSettings.noSavePath: Choose where this video will be saved

formatDescriptions.mp4: Widely compatible video format for most devices and apps.
formatDescriptions.mkv: Flexible container with broad codec support.
formatDescriptions.mov: Editing-friendly container common in Apple and pro workflows.
formatDescriptions.webm: Web-focused format optimized for modern browsers.
formatDescriptions.mp3: Compressed audio-only format with broad support.
formatDescriptions.wav: Uncompressed audio-only format for maximum fidelity.

videoCodecDescriptions.auto: Automatically choose the best available video codec.
videoCodecDescriptions.av1: Modern high-efficiency codec with smaller files but slower encoding.
videoCodecDescriptions.vp9: Efficient web video codec commonly used with WebM.
videoCodecDescriptions.prores: Editing-focused intraframe codec with large files and smooth playback.
videoCodecDescriptions.h265: Better compression than H.264 with less device support.
videoCodecDescriptions.h264: Most compatible video codec for playback and sharing.

audioCodecDescriptions.auto: Automatically choose the best available audio codec.
audioCodecDescriptions.opus: High-efficiency audio codec optimized for web and streaming.
audioCodecDescriptions.vorbis: Open compressed audio codec commonly used with WebM.
audioCodecDescriptions.aac: Common lossy audio codec with broad device support.
audioCodecDescriptions.m4a: AAC audio stored in an MPEG-4 audio container.
audioCodecDescriptions.mp3: Classic lossy audio codec with near-universal support.

compatibilityReasons.videoDisabledForAudioOnly: Video codecs are not used for audio-only formats.

logs.title: Logs
logs.emptyDetail: Download logs will appear here as new attempts start.
logs.noSelectionDetail: Select a queue or history item with a log.
logs.truncated: Showing the most recent 256 KB. Copy actions include only the visible log text.

metadata.emptySubtitle: Or select one from history or queue

bottom.pasteToBegin: Paste a video link to begin

queue.title: Queue
queue.duplicateMessage: This video is already in the queue. Add another copy with the current settings?
